name: Gulaschsuppe (Goulash Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the beef broth in a large pot until hot.
2. Fry onions in hot fat (shortening) until transparent, stirring occasionally.
3. Add green peppers and tomato paste; cook for 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Stir in beef cubes, red pepper, paprika, minced garlic, lemon juice, and caraway seeds.
5. Cover the pot and simmer on low heat for about 1 hour and 30 minutes until the beef is tender.
6. Optionally, add cubed potatoes at this point and cook until they are done (another 20-30 minutes).
7. Serve the soup the second day for best flavor, or reheat before serving.
